markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on performance, review a new tool, and discuss renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Renewal Proposed:** GrowthX proposed a 12-month renewal for 5 articles/week, citing 2x traffic growth on their content vs. 23% on other pages. Joel will discuss the budget with Luke.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [**Engine X Content Blocked:** The Engine X product team blocked a competitor comparison post, demanding all mentions be approved by Stripe. Joel is seeking more product clarity to unblock content.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
  - [**New POC:** Carly Piekos will become the primary point of contact, taking over from Carrie Chowske.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [**New Tool Preview:** GrowthX demoed "Check That," a new AI citation tracking tool. Joel will be a design partner, providing feedback on its UI and features.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)

## Topics

### Engine X Content Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The Engine X product team blocked a competitor comparison post (Brex, Ramp), demanding all mentions be approved by Stripe.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The post's goal was to build credibility by objectively comparing Engine X to major players, not to be a sales pitch.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=1941.0)
  - [**Solution:** Joel will get more product clarity from the Engine X team at an upcoming offsite.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
      - [**Artifact:** Luke and the product owner will record a "fake podcast" to serve as a single source of truth for Engine X capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX will share its fact-checking workflow to prove content accuracy and reduce the review burden on the product team.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=2213.0)

### Performance & Analytics

  - [**Traffic:** Rebounding from a seasonal slowdown.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [Organic traffic dropped \~14% over the holidays, but engagement remained steady.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [New content bets continue to grow, with engagement rates \>65%.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [**AI Visibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
      - [**Referrers:** ChatGPT is the largest LLM referrer; Perplexity is showing strong growth.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
      - [**Citations:** Citations are up, and position has improved by 22%.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
  - [**Amplitude:**](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Clustering:** GrowthX content is now tagged, enabling conversion-adjacent analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Action:** Joel will create a dashboard to show conversion data for GrowthX content.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)

### "Check That" Platform Preview

  - [Kyle demoed "Check That," a new AI citation tracking tool.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
      - [**Curated Library:** Pre-built prompts for the "Expense & Travel" category to accelerate setup.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
      - [**Historical Data:** Instantly applies historical citation data when a new prompt is activated.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [**Joel's Feedback:** The tool needs to surface *unknown* opportunities (e.g., high-volume prompts where competitors are cited but Engine X is not).](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)
  - [**GrowthX Response:** This deeper analysis will likely live in their broader "content OS," which integrates data from GSC, GA, and the website.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)

### Renewal Discussion

  - [Kyle proposed a renewal for the February term.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [**Proposal:**](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
      - [**Scope:** Continue current agreement → 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
      - [**Term:** 12-month agreement (standard for 98% of GrowthX clients).](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The partnership has built a strong foundation, driving 2x traffic growth on GrowthX content vs. 23% on other pages. The next phase will focus on driving conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### Operational Updates

  - [**Content Backlog:** 25 articles are awaiting Joel's review in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
      - [**Guidance:** Review items in the "current week" bucket first, starting with FAQs for faster completion.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [**Meeting Schedule:** No meeting next week due to the GrowthX offsite.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [**Scrunch Cloudflare Worker:** Joel asked if the worker is necessary to get valuable data on what content bots are scraping.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=2426.0)
      - [**GrowthX Response:** They have not used the feature extensively and will investigate its value.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=2426.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Joel:**](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
      - [Review 25-article backlog in Airtable (prioritize "current week" bucket).](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
      - [Discuss the 12-month renewal proposal with Luke.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
      - [Provide feedback on the "Check That" platform after receiving access.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
      - [Grant Joel access to the "Check That" platform.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
      - [Share details on the fact-checking workflow to support Joel's discussions with the Engine X team.](https://fathom.video/share/gK_ZkpzAQtx4yeJNxp9Y9ZVR_N6naTKw?tab=summary&timestamp=2213.0)
